frontmatter.name: Rethinking AI Openness: Data Power, Access & Community Control - Feb, 2026
frontmatter.summary: A roundtable unpacking critical questions around data ownership, openness, and community governance — putting people at the centre of AI ecosystems.
frontmatter.context:
Organised by the [Centre for Communication Governance at NLU Delhi](https://ccgdelhi.org/), this roundtable unpacked critical questions around data ownership, openness, and community governance — putting people at the centre of AI ecosystems. Representing CivicDataLab, Nupura Gawde contributed perspectives on community-led data systems and responsible AI governance.

The session featured speakers: Amlan Mohanty — Fellow, Technology and Society Program, Carnegie; Octavia Field Reid — Associate Director, Ada Lovelace Institute; Meredith Hodgman — Head of Strategy and Engagement, Tech Policy Design Institute; Nupura Gawde — Initiative Lead, Digital Public Infrastructure & Goods and Design and Engagement Lead, CivicDataLab.
